title: stelis ann-jesupiae
intro: Stelis ann-jesupiae, a rare and endangered orchid species, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the orchid family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Stelis ann-jesupiae include its potential to treat various health conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and skin infections, as well as its ability to boost the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in the form of infusions or decoctions, and its extracts have been studied for their potential to be used in pharmaceutical applications, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy.
